testcase.name: 🔐 Auth Flow › Login page loads and has required fields
🔐 Auth Flow › Login shows validation errors on empty submit
🔐 Auth Flow › Login shows error for invalid credentials
🔐 Auth Flow › Protected /dashboard redirects unauthenticated users to login
🔐 Auth Flow › Protected /profile redirects unauthenticated users
🔐 Auth Flow › Signup page loads and has required fields
🔐 Auth Flow › Forgot password page loads with email field
🔐 Auth Flow › Forgot password shows error for missing email
🔐 Auth Flow › Reset password page loads
🔐 Auth Flow › Successful login redirects to dashboard
🕷 Autonomous Website Crawler › Crawl all public pages and audit each
🖼 Visual UI Audit › Page: home › home @ desktop (1280x800)
🖼 Visual UI Audit › Page: home › home @ tablet (768x1024)
🖼 Visual UI Audit › Page: home › home @ mobile (390x844)
🖼 Visual UI Audit › Page: login › login @ desktop (1280x800)
🖼 Visual UI Audit › Page: login › login @ tablet (768x1024)
🖼 Visual UI Audit › Page: login › login @ mobile (390x844)
🖼 Visual UI Audit › Page: signup › signup @ desktop (1280x800)
🖼 Visual UI Audit › Page: signup › signup @ tablet (768x1024)
🖼 Visual UI Audit › Page: signup › signup @ mobile (390x844)
🖼 Visual UI Audit › Page: forgot-password › forgot-password @ desktop (1280x800)
🖼 Visual UI Audit › Page: forgot-password › forgot-password @ tablet (768x1024)
🖼 Visual UI Audit › Page: forgot-password › forgot-password @ mobile (390x844)
🖼 Visual UI Audit › Page: terms › terms @ desktop (1280x800)
🖼 Visual UI Audit › Page: terms › terms @ tablet (768x1024)
🖼 Visual UI Audit › Page: terms › terms @ mobile (390x844)
🖼 Visual UI Audit › Page: privacy › privacy @ desktop (1280x800)
🖼 Visual UI Audit › Page: privacy › privacy @ tablet (768x1024)
🖼 Visual UI Audit › Page: privacy › privacy @ mobile (390x844)
🖼 Visual UI Audit › Desktop navbar has all key links
🖼 Visual UI Audit › Mobile shows bottom navigation bar
🖼 Visual UI Audit › Homepage hero section and CTA buttons are visible on desktop
🖼 Visual UI Audit › Homepage is responsive on mobile (no horizontal scroll)
🖼 Visual UI Audit › Login form is centered and aligned on desktop
🖼 Visual UI Audit › Terms page renders long-form content without overflow
🏠 Homepage Interactions › Home page loads without JS errors
🏠 Homepage Interactions › Home page CTA buttons are clickable
🏠 Homepage Interactions › Navigation links are functional (no dead links)
🔑 Login Form UX › Tab key moves focus between form fields correctly
🔑 Login Form UX › Password field toggles visibility if toggle exists
🔑 Login Form UX › Login button shows loading state on submit
🔑 Login Form UX › Login page has link to Sign Up
🔑 Login Form UX › Login page has link to Forgot Password
📝 Signup Form UX › Signup page renders step 1 with required fields
📝 Signup Form UX › Signup step 1 validates required fields before proceeding
📝 Signup Form UX › Signup has a link back to Login
📝 Signup Form UX › Signup step 1 accepts email input
🔒 Forgot Password UX › Forgot password form submits and shows feedback
🧭 Navigation UX › All top-level nav links are reachable from homepage
🧭 Navigation UX › Mobile hamburger menu (if present) opens & shows links
🧭 Navigation UX › Bottom navigation visible on mobile
🧭 Navigation UX › Back navigation works from Terms page
⌨ Keyboard Navigation UX › Login form is fully navigable by keyboard
⌨ Keyboard Navigation UX › Skip-to-main link is present (screen reader accessibility)
⌨ Keyboard Navigation UX › Enter key submits login form
🔲 Modals & Overlays › Escape key closes open modals
🚨 Error Detection & Console Monitoring › No critical errors on: /
🚨 Error Detection & Console Monitoring › No critical errors on: /login
🚨 Error Detection & Console Monitoring › No critical errors on: /signup
🚨 Error Detection & Console Monitoring › No critical errors on: /forgot-password
🚨 Error Detection & Console Monitoring › No critical errors on: /terms
🚨 Error Detection & Console Monitoring › No critical errors on: /privacy
🚨 Error Detection & Console Monitoring › No 404 responses for critical static assets
🚨 Error Detection & Console Monitoring › Final error report summary
♿ Accessibility Audit (WCAG 2.1 AA) › Home (/) passes accessibility checks
♿ Accessibility Audit (WCAG 2.1 AA) › Login (/login) passes accessibility checks
♿ Accessibility Audit (WCAG 2.1 AA) › Signup (/signup) passes accessibility checks
♿ Accessibility Audit (WCAG 2.1 AA) › ForgotPassword (/forgot-password) passes accessibility checks
♿ Accessibility Audit (WCAG 2.1 AA) › Terms (/terms) passes accessibility checks
♿ Accessibility Audit (WCAG 2.1 AA) › Privacy (/privacy) passes accessibility checks
♿ Accessibility Audit (WCAG 2.1 AA) › Login form inputs have associated labels
♿ Accessibility Audit (WCAG 2.1 AA) › All images on homepage have alt text
♿ Accessibility Audit (WCAG 2.1 AA) › Page has proper heading hierarchy (H1 exists)
♿ Accessibility Audit (WCAG 2.1 AA) › Interactive elements have visible focus rings
♿ Accessibility Audit (WCAG 2.1 AA) › Page language attribute is set
♿ Accessibility Audit (WCAG 2.1 AA) › Links have descriptive text (no bare "click here")
♿ Accessibility Audit (WCAG 2.1 AA) › Accessibility summary report
⚡ Performance Audit › Performance benchmark: Home (/)
⚡ Performance Audit › Performance benchmark: Login (/login)
⚡ Performance Audit › Performance benchmark: Signup (/signup)
⚡ Performance Audit › No render-blocking scripts on homepage
⚡ Performance Audit › Images are using modern formats (webp/avif) or optimised
⚡ Performance Audit › Performance summary report
🔗 Broken Asset Detection › No broken assets on: Home (/)
🔗 Broken Asset Detection › No broken assets on: Login (/login)
🔗 Broken Asset Detection › No broken assets on: Signup (/signup)
🔗 Broken Asset Detection › No broken assets on: ForgotPassword (/forgot-password)
🔗 Broken Asset Detection › No broken assets on: Terms (/terms)
🔗 Broken Asset Detection › No broken assets on: Privacy (/privacy)

🔗 Broken Asset Detection › Custom fonts load successfully
🔗 Broken Asset Detection › Web app manifest (PWA) exists
🔗 Broken Asset Detection › Broken asset summary report
